summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Fairmont x LoversAI luxury venue design platform. All major features working correctly including 6 Fairmont Mumbai venues, conditional angle logic, upload dropdown, template reference modal, hover tooltips, and AI generation.

minor_bugs.issue: Empty prompt error handling test timed out after 60s

ui_bugs.issue: Confirm button not clickable after template selection

passed_tests: Landing page loads with co-branded logos
Studio sidebar shows all 6 Fairmont Mumbai venues
Upload Design Reference dropdown with 2 options
Grand Terminus 1 angle modal shows 3 views (Front, Right, Left)
Aeon Ballroom angle modal shows 2 views (Panoramic, Right)
Madeleine de Proust conditional angle logic
Template reference modal opens and displays templates
Hover tooltips on space cards show venue images
Hover tooltips on event type cards show thumbnails
File upload functionality triggers file browser
AI image generation with prompt and filters
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix template reference modal confirm button clickability issue. Minor backend timeout issue can be addressed if needed.
